title: Uruguayan Wrap
description: A fusion of Uruguayan flavors wrapped in a crispy tortilla. This dish combines the rich taste of grilled os with the tanginess of cultured sauce.
instructions: Season os with salt, pepper, and 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Grill os for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Spread cultured sauce evenly over the wrap.
Slice grilled os into thin strips.
Place os strips onto the wrap, followed by shredded cheese and a spoonful of Teque salsa.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
